description: Short for Darwin Customer Experience. Do not translate.
Full product name. Do not translate.
Brand name used in sample data. Do not translate.
Payment product name. Do not translate.
Buy One Get One. Industry acronym — keep as is.
Module name. Translate as "Marketing Studio" (keep English) or "Marketing-Studio".
Magazine/publication edition. NEVER translate as "Problem" or "Thema".
The edition on which a subscription is activated. Not a problem.
The edition on which a subscription expires.
The window during which a subscription renews. Not "Renewal Prime Tier".
Customer retention (marketing). NEVER translate as "Aufbewahrung" or "Zurückbehaltung".
Product offer (what a customer can buy).
Commerce offer tied to a product.
Product bundle. Keep as "Bundle" (do not translate as "Paket").
A subscription given to another person.
Person who buys a gift subscription for someone else.
The publishing house / company publishing a magazine.
Order fulfillment (magazine/package delivery). Keep "Fulfillment" if brand preference, otherwise "Auftragserfüllung".
Customer access entitlement to a product.
Money routed from customer to publisher. Use "Zahlungen an den Verlag".
Subscription that has expired without renewal.
Complimentary subscription for a company rep. Internal term.
Full renewal journey for a subscription.
Act of auditing. In "Circulation Audit" → "Auflagenprüfung"; elsewhere "Audit".
